My agent count confirms 19 active specialists, but five lack versioned prompts including 'desktop', 'devops', 'financial_analyst', 'pim', and 'reasoning_methods'. I will prioritize resolving the Neo4j authentication issue and adding prompt versions to those five agents during my next self-improvement cycle.
